steps.title: Count the doublings
steps.content:
From $1705$ to $1985$ is
$$
1985-1705=280
$$
With one doubling every $70$ years, the population doubled
$$
\frac{280}{70}=4
$$
times.

steps.title: Work backward
steps.content: Let $P$ be the population in $1705$. After $4$ doublings, $$ 16P=256{,}000 $$ so $$ P=\frac{256{,}000}{16}=16{,}000 $$ The answer is 16000.
